response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no reference lyrics were provided in the JSON). 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the empty reference JSON. Performed manual audio transcription for the spoken dialogue and fully translated the on-screen letter text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken thank-you to its exact audio duration, then logically segmented the on-screen written message across the instrumental section to provide continuous, high-quality translation of the visual event.

subtitles.original: いつもばめと楽しいを共有してくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for always sharing fun times with Bame!

subtitles.original: ばめチームが期待してくれるから、もっと変わりたい！もっと成長したいって思えるよ！
subtitles.english: Because the Bame Team expects great things of me, it makes me want to change and grow even more!

subtitles.original: ばめの歩みを支えてくれてありがとう♡
subtitles.english: Thank you for supporting Bame's journey ♡

subtitles.original: これからもばめと一緒に良い景色をみていきたいです！
subtitles.english: I want to continue seeing wonderful sights together with Bame from now on!
